en_title: Xbox Says Gears of War: E-Day PS5 Port Was Not Pulled 'Last-Minute' After Art With PS5 Logo Leaks
cn_title: Xbox否认《战争机器：事变日》PS5版临时取消
subtitle: 意外泄露引发猜测
opus_summary: Xbox播客意外泄露含PS5标志的《战争机器：事变日》宣传图，引发PS5版猜测。Xbox副总裁否认临时取消，强调该作为Xbox独占。

paragraphs.en: Xbox says Gears of War: E-Day was not pulled from PlayStation "last-minute" after the company accidentally published an image showing Gears of War: E-Day with PS5 as one of its launch platforms.
paragraphs.cn: Xbox表示，《战争机器：事变日》并非在「最后一刻」才从PlayStation平台撤下，此前该公司意外发布了一张将PS5列为首发平台的宣传图。

paragraphs.en: The official Xbox Podcast is responsible for the leak, which saw it mistakenly upload a version of a Gears deep dive that included the PlayStation mention. One version of a slide featured in the video included the same art shown during its grand reveal at the Xbox Games Showcase 2026, only with PS5 included on the list of platforms.
paragraphs.cn: 此次泄露源自官方Xbox播客，该播客错误上传了一个包含PlayStation信息的《战争机器》深度解析视频版本。视频中的一页幻灯片使用了与2026年Xbox游戏展上首次公布时相同的宣传图，但平台列表中多了PS5。

paragraphs.en: The competing logo shares the screen with the October 6, 2026 release date, suggesting it was far enough in development to launch alongside other, confirmed platforms. Microsoft speedily scrubbed both its YouTube channel and official Xbox page of any mention of the leaked art – but not before many on the internet, including ResetEra user Jessie.Bristol , were able to capture and share the image online.
paragraphs.cn: 竞争对手的Logo与2026年10月6日的发售日期同屏出现，暗示该版本开发进度已足以与其他已确认平台同步发售。微软迅速从其YouTube频道和官方Xbox页面删除了所有提及泄露图片的内容——但在此之前，包括ResetEra用户Jessie.Bristol在内的许多网友已截取并分享了该图片。

paragraphs.en: There's been a lot of back and forth about whether the gritty Gears of War prequel would come to PlayStation or stick to Xbox and PC in recent days. After Walmart accidentally published a Gears of War: E-Day PS5 placeholder page on June 6, many believed it would be another multiplatform game. Xbox CEO Asha Sharma squashed those beliefs during yesterday's showcase when she confirmed it will be an Xbox console exclusive.
paragraphs.cn: 近日，关于这款硬核《战争机器》前传究竟会登陆PlayStation还是坚守Xbox和PC的争论不绝于耳。6月6日沃尔玛意外上线了《战争机器：事变日》PS5占位页面后，许多人认为它将成为又一款多平台游戏。Xbox CEO阿莎·夏尔玛在昨日的发布会上打消了这些念头，她确认该作将是Xbox主机独占。

paragraphs.en: Gears of War: E-Day will only be coming to PC via Steam and Xbox on PC, Xbox Cloud, and Xbox Series X|S. Microsoft has insisted that it has no intention of ever bringing the game to PS5 .
paragraphs.cn: 《战争机器：事变日》仅通过Steam和Xbox应用登陆PC，以及Xbox Cloud和Xbox Series X|S。微软坚称，从未打算将该作带到PS5。

paragraphs.en: Still, there have been rumors online, suggesting that Microsoft made the decision to pull the game from PlayStation only very recently. IGN reached out to Microsoft for comment and was pointed to a statement published by Xbox vice president of games marketing Aaron Greenberg.
paragraphs.cn: 然而，网上仍有传言称，微软直到最近才决定将游戏从PlayStation撤下。IGN联系微软置评，对方指向了Xbox游戏营销副总裁Aaron Greenberg发布的一份声明。

paragraphs.en: Replying to The Verge's Tom Warren, Greenberg does not seem to address the image itself. Instead, he said, "I can confirm this is not true," referencing rumors that Microsoft had pulled Gears of War: E-Day from PS5 "last-minute."
paragraphs.cn: 在回复The Verge的Tom Warren时，Greenberg似乎并未直接回应图片本身。相反，他说道：「我可以确认这不是真的。」他指的是微软在「最后一刻」将《战争机器：事变日》从PS5撤下的传言。

paragraphs.en: "We just limited the knowledge of this news to a very small internal group," he continued. "Intention was to share this news first with our players and everyone watching showcase."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们只是将这个消息限制在一个非常小的内部团队中，」他继续说道，「目的是先与我们的玩家和所有观看发布会的人分享这一消息。」

paragraphs.en: "A lot has changed since Asha came into role 107 days ago," Greenberg added in an additional post . "We are moving fast and it’s frankly pretty energizing inside the hallways here. I was made aware of these exclusives roughly a month in advance."
paragraphs.cn: 「自从阿莎上任107天以来，很多事情都变了，」Greenberg在另一篇帖子中补充道，「我们行动迅速，坦白说，公司内部充满了活力。我大约提前一个月才得知这些独占消息。」

paragraphs.en: Microsoft has played its cards close to its chest as it redefines its exclusivity strategy , so we do not know for sure when or if Gears of War: E-Day was ever coming to PS5. However, the art published by the official Xbox Podcast at least suggests the conversation was there at some point.
paragraphs.cn: 微软在重新定义独占策略时一直秘而不宣，因此我们无法确定《战争机器：事变日》是否曾计划登陆PS5，以及具体何时。不过，官方Xbox播客发布的图片至少表明，相关讨论曾在某个时间点存在过。

paragraphs.en: Even if Gears of War: E-Day had been announced for PS5, it wouldn't be the first time Microsoft brought chainsaw guns to PlayStation fans. Gears of War: Reloaded , a ground-up remaster of the original game for PC, Xbox Series X|S, and PS5, arrived in August 2025.
paragraphs.cn: 即便《战争机器：事变日》曾宣布登陆PS5，那也不是微软第一次将链锯枪带给PlayStation玩家。《战争机器：重装上阵》——初代游戏针对PC、Xbox Series X|S和PS5的完全重制版——已于2025年8月发售。

paragraphs.en: Gears of War: E-Day, which was first announced back in 2024 , could be shaping up as a case of nostalgia done right based on its gameplay reveal yesterday. A multiplayer beta is coming on August 6.
paragraphs.cn: 《战争机器：事变日》最初于2024年公布，从昨日的实机演示来看，它有望成为一次成功的怀旧之作。多人测试版将于8月6日上线。

paragraphs.en: For more, you can read about how last year's Game Pass price increase resulted in millions of subscribers canceling their subscriptions . You can also check out everything announced at the Xbox Games Showcase 2026 .
paragraphs.cn: 更多信息，你可以阅读去年Game Pass涨价导致数百万用户取消订阅的报道。你也可以查看2026年Xbox游戏展上公布的所有内容。

paragraphs.en: Xbox Podcast screenshot captured by ResetEra user Jessie.Bristol.
